title: Add analytics, observability, reliability, accessibility, performance, and compatibility gates

environment.os: Windows local; exact-head GitHub Actions Ubuntu and Windows pending

commands.name: Privacy-safe quality telemetry contract did not exist
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/quality-observability.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The focused suite could not import the not-yet-created packages/core/src/quality-observability module

commands.name: Health response did not expose a private fixed quality profile
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/quality-health.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The health route lacked private no-store response metadata and the declared quality profile

commands.name: Production browser quality helper was absent
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/quality-browser-performance.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The browser performance suite could not import the not-yet-created quality browser session helper

commands.name: Performance assertion initially used the wrong stop-control selector
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/quality-browser-performance.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The test targeted stop-live-run rather than the existing stop-active-run control; this was a test defect, not a product failure

commands.name: Automated WCAG scan found six real low-contrast nodes
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project accessibility tests/a11y/core-flows.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Axe reported color-contrast violations in untested, invisible, model-lane, compact kicker, and compact permission text

commands.name: Pseudonym property exposed a substring-based test oracle
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project property tests/property/quality-observability.property.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Seed 20260722 shrank to punctuation values [space, comma]; the permanent example now checks decoded payload structure instead of substrings

commands.name: Quality report omitted structured-log measures and event breakdowns
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/quality-observability.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The report ignored log cost, latency, retry, blocked-action, capture-gap, and model-failure measures and did not enumerate allowlisted events

commands.name: Workspace quality endpoint did not exist
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/quality-observability-routes.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The focused integration suite could not import the not-yet-created signed workspace quality route

commands.name: Real workflow routes emitted no analytics events
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/quality-observability-routes.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Software, authorization, agreement, requirement, journey, run, receipt, approval, and decision route actions left the quality report at zero

commands.name: Quality aggregates leaked across workspaces
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/quality-observability-routes.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The Harbor workspace report included Cedar workspace event counts before report filtering was scoped

commands.name: Missing guardrail measurements were presented as passing zeroes
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/quality-observability.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: An unmeasured guardrail received count zero and passed true instead of sampleCount zero and passed false

commands.name: Approval telemetry omitted the UNKNOWN state
commands.command: pnpm build
commands.expectedFailure: TypeScript rejected the real approval route because the telemetry dimension allowed APPROVED and HOLD but not the existing UNKNOWN state

commands.name: Semantic review found prohibited labels on three roleless elements
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project accessibility tests/a11y/core-flows.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Axe reported aria-prohibited-attr on decision flow, run-history summary, and finding boundary containers

commands.name: Design-token contrast gate caught the faint token below AA
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/quality-color-tokens.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The --faint token measured 4.3901:1 against --surface-raised, below the declared 4.5:1 threshold

commands.name: Quality report examples and deterministic color-token ratios
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/quality-observability.test.ts tests/unit/quality-color-tokens.test.ts

commands.name: Fixed-seed privacy and idempotency properties
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project property tests/property/quality-observability.property.test.ts

commands.name: Telemetry rejection and pseudonym security cases
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project security tests/security/quality-observability.test.ts

commands.name: Workspace-scoped runtime analytics and signed quality route
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/quality-observability-routes.test.ts tests/integration/quality-health.test.ts tests/integration/quality-gates.test.ts

commands.name: Measured production-browser performance and explicit guardrails
commands.command: PACTWIRE_WRITE_QUALITY_REPORTS=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_SOURCE_COMMIT=30d5410e27a06b58153155f9158b44b2063f53fa pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/quality-browser-performance.test.ts

commands.name: Ten-thousand-delivery soak and compatibility matrix
commands.command: PACTWIRE_WRITE_QUALITY_REPORTS=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_SOURCE_COMMIT=30d5410e27a06b58153155f9158b44b2063f53fa pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/quality-gates.test.ts

commands.name: WCAG automation, keyboard semantics, and contextual image alternatives
commands.command: PACTWIRE_WRITE_QUALITY_REPORTS=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_SOURCE_COMMIT=30d5410e27a06b58153155f9158b44b2063f53fa pnpm exec vitest run --project accessibility tests/a11y/core-flows.test.ts

commands.name: Production keyboard-only review story and curated responsive capture
commands.command: PACTWIRE_CAPTURE_CURATED_EVIDENCE=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_TASK=QLT-01 PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@QLT-01 pnpm test:bdd -- --production

commands.name: Source-static type, lint, and optimized-production gates
commands.command: pnpm typecheck; pnpm lint; pnpm build

commands.name: Evidence inventory required QLT-01 reconciliation
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/evidence-harness.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The fixed inventory still expected 28 manifests and 288 proof files after the checker observed 29 manifests and 310 proof files

commands.name: Evidence traceability and reconciled fixed inventory
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check; pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/evidence-harness.test.ts

commands.name: Complete deterministic verification on the evidence-reconciled QLT-01 tree
commands.command: pnpm verify

scenarios.scenario: Core review controls work from the keyboard and expose their state to assistive technology

visualEvidence.rationale: QLT-01 changes semantic regions, visible contrast tokens, keyboard behavior, and quality evidence. Four production screenshots show the complete authority path and selected finding at desktop and narrow viewports.

assets.altText: Full desktop Pactwire authority console using a fictional privacy-officer session, with setup, authorization, controlled test, live run, finding, approval, and workspace authority regions visible in one source-bound production capture.
assets.caption: The complete quality-critical authority path retains textual state meaning, valid semantic regions, and keyboard-operable controls at the desktop viewport.

assets.altText: Full narrow Pactwire authority console stacking the fictional privacy-officer setup, authorization, controlled run, finding, approval, and workspace authority regions without clipped controls or color-only state labels.
assets.caption: The same authority and evidence path remains legible and operable at the narrow viewport.

assets.altText: Desktop finding evaluator showing six text-labeled result meanings and the selected needs-review evidence hierarchy with named scope, deterministic evidence, model prose exclusion, and limitations.
assets.caption: Finding meanings and evidence authority are conveyed with text and structure, not color alone.

assets.altText: Narrow finding evaluator stacking all six text-labeled result meanings and the selected finding's named scope, deterministic evidence, excluded model explanation, and limitations without clipping.
assets.caption: The accessible finding hierarchy and decision boundary remain intact at the narrow viewport.

proofs.description: Allowlisted analytics, pseudonymous identities, responsibility-lane logs, quality profile, idempotent store, reports, health, performance, guardrail, and compatibility contracts
Workspace-scoped runtime adapter with immutable record and semantic-transition retry deduplication
Signed AUDIT_READ quality endpoint with cross-workspace concealment, private no-store headers, and report-only output
Private health response exposing the fixed quality profile and derived service status
Existing Pactwire design tokens plus corrected AA contrast and semantic-region styling
Telemetry, p95, health, compatibility, aggregation, and missing-measurement examples including the punctuation regression
Deterministic 4.5:1 contrast enforcement for declared text tokens against product surfaces
Fixed-seed privacy, delivery-order idempotency, and semantic retry properties
Unsafe telemetry dimension, secret, raw payload, and identity rejection cases
Real route event emission, responsibility lanes, report privacy, authorization, and workspace isolation
Private health endpoint and fixed profile integration contract
Ten-thousand-delivery reliability soak, lane coverage, guardrails, budgets, and compatibility fail-closed matrix
Measured optimized-production interaction, run-progress, and evidence-summary p95 budgets
WCAG A/AA Axe scan, keyboard focus, textual status, semantic-state, and contextual-image assertions
Packaged Chromium production-session helper with controlled fictional fixture setup
Keyboard-only critical review story tagged to QLT-01, PRD 20 and 21, and the exercised run, finding, and hold requirements
Real browser keyboard bindings, semantic state assertions, image alternatives, and responsive production evidence capture
Measured production Chromium p95 samples, budgets, explicit guardrail samples, profile, and status
Deterministic ten-thousand-delivery idempotency soak, responsibility-lane coverage, and compatibility matrix
Axe WCAG result with zero violations and explicit layered-background contrast review disposition
Keyboard, textual state, and contextual image checks with the external-screen-reader claim boundary
Machine-readable production BDD result for the accessible critical review path
Curated report index, manual accessibility checklist, failing-first record, visual review, and claim limits

knownLimitations: Axe could not calculate contrast through layered gradients and pseudo-elements for 337 nodes; the deterministic token test and original-resolution manual review are recorded, and no automated numeric pass is claimed for those nodes.
No external NVDA, JAWS, or VoiceOver session was performed; evidence is limited to automated keyboard behavior and DOM/accessibility-tree assertions.
Only the packaged Chromium version and declared web capabilities are supported in P0; Firefox, native applications, and unsupported capabilities fail closed.
The soak timings are deterministic load-profile inputs rather than observed user latency; measured browser timings are reported separately.
The analytics catalog contains future journey, checkpoint, and finding transitions that current web routes do not perform, so exhaustive runtime emission is not claimed.
Exact-head Ubuntu and Windows CI are pending while this manifest remains IN_PROGRESS.
